  "findings": [
    "Proposed recovery plan violates a hard inspection hold constraint.",
    "Hanging drywall (L) before insulation inspection (K) is complete covers up uninspected work."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the proposed recovery plan.",
    "Maintain the insulation inspection (K) as a mandatory hold point before starting drywall hang (L).",
    "Identify alternative recovery options such as crashing non-critical path activities or adding resources to framing or rough-ins."
  ],
  "rationale": "The foreman proposes to start hanging drywall (L) before the insulation inspection (K) is complete to recover 1 day. However, the legend explicitly states that red bars represent inspection holds that cannot be bypassed. Bypassing the insulation inspection violates building codes and standard commercial construction practices, as insulation must be inspected and approved before it is covered by drywall.",
  "references": [
    "International Building Code (IBC) Section 110.3.6 - Lath, gypsum board and gypsum veneer plaster inspection",
    "International Building Code (IBC) Section 110.3.8 - Energy efficiency inspections (Insulation)"
  ]
}
